title: xantolis venulosa
intro: Xantolis venulosa, also known as the "red warty tree," is a tropical plant native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant's bark and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xantolis venulosa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Xantolis venulosa can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
